The Zit Happens Killa Bunny Acne Patches are a bold collaboration between Plush Trap and Zit Happens! These hydrocolloid pimple patches come in an adorable bunny-themed mirror case, making breakout defense both effective and cute. Because skincare should be fun!

✨ Plush Trap x Zit Happens Collaboration

This exclusive collab brings together Plush Trap's kawaii aesthetic with Zit Happens' effective acne solutions. The result? Acne patches that actually work, packaged in a mirror case you'll want to show off. Breakout defense has never looked this good.

🎯 What Makes These Acne Patches Special

  • Hydrocolloid Technology: Absorbs pimple gunk, reduces inflammation, protects from picking
  • Bunny Mirror Case: Adorable Plush Trap design with built-in mirror for easy application
  • Bold Breakout Defense: Wear them proudly – skincare is self-care
  • Exclusive Collaboration: Limited Plush Trap x Zit Happens design

💊 How Hydrocolloid Patches Work

Hydrocolloid patches are medical-grade bandages that:
- Absorb pus and oil from pimples
- Create protective barrier against bacteria
- Reduce inflammation and redness
- Prevent picking and scarring
- Speed up healing process
- Work overnight or throughout the day

🐰 The Bunny Mirror Case

The exclusive Plush Trap bunny design isn't just cute – it's functional! The built-in mirror lets you apply patches anywhere, anytime. Keep it in your bag for emergency breakout defense on the go.

  • Features: Built-in mirror for easy application
